architecture.summary: CSS Custom Properties, CSS Grid 12-col, @keyframes+IntersectionObserver, Docusaurus 3 swizzle (wrap+eject), Lucide React, Inter font, no Tailwind/Framer Motion

integrations.summary: Docusaurus 3.9.2, Remotion 4, Lucide React icons, existing Cloudflare analytics, existing search plugin

ui-ux.summary: 11 landing sections, 15 new components, mega-menu navbar, fluid typography clamp(), glass morphism, word-by-word animation, 4 user personas

security.summary: N/A - static marketing site, no auth/data handling

performance.summary: SVGs for all icons/logos, no CDN image opt, no critical CSS inlining, lazy-load video with poster+IntersectionObserver, MP4 H.264 + WebM VP9 dual format, Lighthouse 90+

edge-cases.summary: Progressive enhancement for IntersectionObserver (show by default, animate on client via useEffect), pin Docusaurus 3.9.x, accept manual 4.0 migration, graceful degradation no BrowserOnly
